programme.title: I'm Still Here
programme.desc: Oscar®-nominated actor Casey Affleck, in his directorial debut, together with fellow Oscar® nominee Joaquin Phoenix blow the roof off of conventional fi lmmaking in this unique and groundbreaking experimental project.

programme.title: What's the Worst That Could Happen?
programme.desc: Kevin is a thief who breaks into Max Fairbanks' unoccupied mansion. Kevin finds himself face to face with Max. And just as the cops arrest Kevin, Max claims Kevin's ring as his own.

programme.title: Traffic
programme.desc: A conservative judge is appointed by the President to spearhead America's escalating war against drugs, only to discover that his teenage daughter is an addict.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Cash Game $200/$400 No Limit Holdem 2022 - Part 1
programme.desc: WPT High stakes cash is back as season 19 kicks off with a bang.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Cash Game $200/$400 No Limit Holdem 2022 - Part 2
programme.desc: Ali Imisiriovic is no stranger to high-stakes cash and he is playing for pots worth thousands.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Cash Game $200/$400 No Limit Holdem 2022 - Part 4
programme.desc: Renowned tournament and cash game player Chris Brewer joins the table with plans of winning thousands.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Cash Game $50/$100 No Limit Holdem 2022 - Part 1
programme.desc: A star-studded cast of poker pros joins WPT's high-stakes cash to compete for thousands of dollars.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Cash Game $50/$100 No Limit Holdem 2022 - Part 2
programme.desc: Big personalities and even bigger bluffs on this episode of WPT high-stakes cash.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Cash Game $50/$100 No Limit Holdem 2022 - Part 3
programme.desc: Hollywood chef Paul Kuzmich is trying to cook up something special at the high-stakes cash table.

programme.title: The Best of the Adventures
programme.desc: A feature-length compilation of the funniest and naughtiest bits from the legendary 1970s’ ‘Adventures of’ series! Directed by Stanley Long, it stars a cavalcade of classic comedy actors!

programme.title: Red Roses of Passion
programme.desc: Jaded Carla drugs her stuck up aunt and her daughter with mind-altering aphrodisiac concocted from a rose by an ominous Pan sex cult. The women become crazed nymphos and the only way to cure them is for Carla to give herself to "Pan".

programme.title: Trauma
programme.desc: In this heart-pounding thriller by Italian horror legend Dario Argento, a young man tries to help an escaped psychiatric patient find the serial killer who murdered her parents.

programme.title: Invasion U.S.A.
programme.desc: An army of terrorist mercenaries led by Soviet agent Rostov catches America unprepared and makes it a war zone from sea to shining sea. Only one man can stem the rising tide of violence: retired agent and martial arts expert Matt Hunter.

programme.title: Windtalkers
programme.desc: True story about members of the Navajo tribe who proudly served the U.S. in WW II as code talkers by using their native language as a code to relay information to military leaders.

programme.title: The Debt Collector
programme.desc: French is a martial artist that takes on a job as a mob debt collector in order to make ends meet. He does whatever it takes to chase down individuals until he meets a bartender that makes him question whether he should do the right thing.

programme.title: The Ninth Gate
programme.desc: A rare book dealer, while seeking out the last two copies of a demon text, gets drawn into a conspiracy with supernatural overtones. Starring: Johnny Depp, Frank Langella, Lena Olin

programme.title: Hackers
programme.desc: A neophyte hacker becomes the target of the FBI after he unknowingly taps into a high-tech embezzling scheme which could cause a horrific environmental disaster in this suspenseful drama.

programme.title: Terminal
programme.desc: In the dark heart of a sprawling, anonymous city, Terminal follows the twisting tales of two assassins carrying out a sinister mission (Max Irons & Dexter Fletcher), a teacher battling a fatal illness (Simon Pegg), an enigmatic janitor (Mike Myers)...

programme.title: Under The Crystal Sky
programme.desc: In the 1800s, in the American Southwest, an Indigenous family, consisting of a mother, father, and daughter; witness a UFO crash near their home. Following the extraterrestrial event, strange occurrences transpire around them.

programme.title: Futra Days
programme.desc: After undergoing an experimental time travel "process" that sends a man into his future, he investigates the man he has become, by engaging in a romance with his future self's girlfriend in a mind-bending reality.

programme.title: Space Truckers
programme.desc: A space trucker and his cute fiancee are on their way from a space station to Earth with an unknown cargo. When space pirates hijack them, 5000 disintegrator robots are found in the cargo.

programme.title: Deadliest Journeys: Vietnam
programme.desc: We are in the Quan Hoa mountains in the Northwest of Vietnam. It is one of the poorest and most isolated regions in the country.

programme.title: Deadliest Journeys: Cameroon
programme.desc: The bravest drivers in Cameroon are named the “Clandos”; the name comes from the word clandestine or illegal.

programme.title: Deadliest Journeys: Bangladesh
programme.desc: In Bangladesh, bamboo harvesters raft massive floats through treacherous waters to deliver their payload.

programme.title: Deadliest Journeys: China's Dragon Road
programme.desc: In the south of China, in the Guizhou province, mountains cover 90% of the land. Within these mountains, two of the region's most vital and abundant resources are found.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Suspension
programme.desc: A furious Joe fights against a federal suspension that will prevent him from carrying passengers for the first time in 20 years.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Cause for Celebration
programme.desc: AJ and Candace get married in the Ice Castle. A frustrated Chuck tries to get the Electra to pay her way. A flummoxed Mikey tries to bake a cake for Joe's birthday.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Thin Ice
programme.desc: C-46 and DC-4 crews race against the spring melt to fly mining equipment to an airstrip on a frozen lake.

programme.title: Invasion of the Body Snatchers
programme.desc: This dazzling remake of the 1956 spine-tingler stars Donald Sutherland, Brooke Adams, Jeff Goldblum, Leonard Nimoy and Veronica Cartwright in an eerie tale of possession by "alien pods."

programme.title: Gretel & Hansel
programme.desc: A long time ago in a distant fairytale countryside, a young girl (Sophia Lillis) leads her little brother (newcomer Samuel J. Leakey) into a dark wood in desperate search of food and work, only to stumble upon a nexus of terrifying evil.

programme.title: Awoken
programme.desc: A medical student attempts to cure her brother from a terminal sleep illness, but a more sinister reason for his condition is revealed.

programme.title: 2023 FIFA Women's World Cup
programme.desc: Watch the full match replay between Japan and Sweden played at Eden Park, Auckland / Tāmaki Makaurau on Friday, August 11, 2023.

programme.title: Unforgettable Penalty Shootouts
programme.desc: Feel the tension of the most memorable penalty shootouts in the FIFA World Cup™.

programme.title: FIFA Women's World Cup 2023
programme.desc: Sweden contests USA at Melbourne Rectangular Stadium in the round of last 16 of the 2023 World Cup. This is the most played fixture in the World Cup. This is the seventh time they have met at the tournament, but the first time in the knockout phase.

programme.title: Blitz
programme.desc: A tough cop (Jason Statham) goes after a serial killer who targets police officers.

programme.title: Chaos
programme.desc: A veteran detective and a rookie cop have to stop a master thief's computer virus before it drains all the funds from a bank's accounts.

programme.title: The Bank Job
programme.desc: In 1971 London, a car dealer and his gang of thieves break into a bank vault and find far more than cash and jewelry.

programme.title: Snooker 900
programme.desc: Snooker 900 is the new fast, 15-minute version of snooker. It features legends like Jimmy White and showcases top amateurs, juniors, women, and disabled players.

programme.title: Rocket Method
programme.desc: Ronnie O'Sullivan teaches snooker fundamentals, guiding viewers through the essential skills and techniques to improve their game, the Rocket Method.

programme.title: Snooker 900
programme.desc: Live Snooker 900, the new fast and exciting version of the game featuring many of the game’s legendary players in weekly competitions.

programme.title: Cursed Treasures
programme.desc: The hunt for Cursed Treasure begins in Staffordshire, England, where the onset of a violent storm announced the discovery of the largest Anglo-Saxon hoard ever uncovered. But was the storm an omen of things to come?

programme.title: Cursed Treasures
programme.desc: The hunt for Cursed Treasure takes us to India at the time of the Mughal Empire and a jewel that is linked to centuries of greed and bloodshed.

programme.title: Secrets of Great British Castles

programme.title: Secrets of Great British Castles

programme.title: Last Tango in Paris
programme.desc: Marlon Brando delivers a fascinating performance as a man torn apart by his wife's suicide who attempts to bury his grief in a sudden, purely carnal relationship with an alluring stranger.

programme.title: Emmanuelle In Soho
programme.desc: Sultry Emmanuelle is determined to do whatever it takes to be the sensation of Soho's strip clubs - even if it means signing up with London's sleaziest agent! Red hot and blue!

programme.desc: Two small-town teenagers move to London's West End and get involved in prostitution and pornography before tiring of big-city life. Starring: Robin Askwith, Janet Lynn, Jess Conrad

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Tom Cruise
programme.desc: Tom Cruise enters the danger zone as Tony Scott pushes the limits of the Navy and his actors to achieve his sun-kissed vision.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Tom Cruise
programme.desc: Having proved he’s a star, Tom now wanted to test himself as an actor. While remaining in the shadow of Dustin Hoffman’s performance in Rain Man, Tom is able to get his first Oscar nomination by breaking out of his mold in Born on the 4th of July.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Tom Cruise
programme.desc: Tom’s next two films will launch the careers of everyone around him while nearly delivering him that elusive Oscar. A Few Good Men is once again a win for Jack Nicholson rather than Tom, but Jerry Maguire brings him in reach of the Oscar.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Tom Cruise
programme.desc: Tom Cruise tests his limits, becoming a producer and taking on ever riskier stunts. But it’s his personal life that nearly sends his career spinning.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Tom Cruise
programme.desc: Tom pushes everyone to the limit to deliver a fitting sequel to Top Gun 30 years later. After Tony Scott’s untimely death, Tom takes the lead finding a story that speaks to him, with real planes and real danger.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: The Lord of the Rings
programme.desc: J.R.R Tolkien’s children’s book and trilogy take the world by storm, appealing to the fans its author would least expect. After several failed attempts to adapt the books and one half-successful animated movie, an unlikely hero takes on the film.

programme.title: The State of Things
programme.desc: The crew is running out of money to finish their film.

programme.title: We Are What We Are
programme.desc: Shocking, bloody and deeply affecting, We Are What We Are is a visceral and powerful portrait of a family bound by a monstrous secret.

programme.title: Borg vs. McEnroe
programme.desc: The story of the legendary 1980s tennis rivalry between the placid Björn Borg (Sverrir Gudnason) and the volatile John McEnroe (Shia LaBeouf).

programme.title: Biography: WWE Legends
programme.desc: Chronicling Brie and Nikki's journey from waitresses to WWE Superstars and pop culture icons; success in sports got the Bellas through a difficult childhood and helped them survive personal traumas.

programme.title: WWE Rivals
programme.desc: The battle between WWE and WCW for the top spot on television in the mid '90s and early 2000s takes the entertainment world by storm; commonly known as the "Monday Night Wars," WWE uses its cutting-edge product to combat Ted Turner's WCW.

programme.title: WWE Rivals
programme.desc: From street fights at Madison Square Garden to battling inside Hell in a Cell, Mick Foley becomes the measuring stick for "Hunter Hearst Helmsley" (aka Triple H) to prove his true toughness.

programme.title: WWE Rivals
programme.desc: Cena and Edge relive their epic conflicts against one another; Freddie Prinze Jr. breaks down what made this rivalry all so memorable in a roundtable discussion with Kevin Nash, Cody Rhodes, Beth Phoenix and John Bradshaw Layfield.

programme.title: Hoarders
programme.desc: Experts help shopaholic Kristy, whose hoarding habit has got so out of hand Child Protection Services have had to remove her son.

programme.title: Hoarders
programme.desc: Julie's hoarding has reached such heights she didn't realise there was a homeless woman living among mounds of junk in her basement. Now, it's time for her to tidy up.

programme.title: Hoarders
programme.desc: Jill's two sons resent her for her hoarding and their mouldy and dusty home. Meanwhile, firefighter Tra's house of chaos is starting to affect his performance on the job.

programme.title: Hoarders
programme.desc: The slovenly state of a man's home may have contributed to his girlfriend's death. Ever since Linda's husband died ten years ago, she has been adding to a hoard that has now spiralled out of control.

programme.title: Hoarders
programme.desc: Fred and Mary deny that they are hoarders yet live in an over-spilling house full of cockroaches. Experts must get them to face up to their compulsion.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: When Cedric and Sophia hear that royalty will visit Evergreen Forest, Bert dreams of becoming a knight. Meanwhile, Cyril wants knighthood for power, leading both into humorous efforts to impress the royal visitors during their stay.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Cyril schemes to buy the Evergreen Standard by cutting off its supplies with help from Mr. Knox, who demands payment in gold. Bert tries to save the paper by finding a way to secure resources, leading to a risky plan to outsmart Cyril.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: A pro baseball team visits Evergreen Forest and seeks a new player. Bert and Cedric both compete for the spot, straining their friendship as rivalry grows. In the end, they must decide what matters more, success or their bond.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Cyril offers Bert a deal to become the face of his new cologne line. Tempted by fame and money, Bert considers the offer, but soon realizes the cost of endorsing Cyril’s schemes and must choose between integrity and success.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Cyril panics when his betrayed partner Karl Snarl returns for revenge. Meanwhile, Bert discovers an old helicopter, and Melissa must overcome her fear of heights to help save her friends during a dangerous confrontation.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: After losing power due to unpaid bills, Cyril plans to build a dam to control energy in the forest. Meanwhile, Bert and Cedric stay with Aunt Gertie, whose strict ways test their patience while bigger trouble brews outside.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Cousin Bentley visits the Raccoons, bringing his usual quirks along. Meanwhile, Cyril seeks to regain his youth using a questionable potion, leading to chaos as his reckless attempt causes unexpected and humorous consequences.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Bert and Melissa explore echo caverns and discover strange cave art. Cyril, seeing profit potential, enters the art world and drives up prices. The gang must decide whether art is about value or meaning as greed takes over.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Believing Cyril is dying, Bert spends his savings on a tribute monument. When Cyril learns he is fine, he exploits the situation to sabotage the Evergreen Standard, forcing Bert to recover from his costly mistake quickly.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Bert and Cedric meet a hermit living in a swamp rumored to hold oil. Cyril attempts to buy the land, threatening the hermit’s home. The gang must protect the swamp and prove its worth beyond the profit Cyril seeks.

programme.title: Deadly Women

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Sometimes, when a man and a woman unite, a terrible urge for destruction can awaken in them both. Happy couples become deadly teams, intent on one goal: murder.

programme.desc: On June 27, 2005, Dennis Rader, known as the BTK killer, pleads guilty to ten murders he committed in Wichita, Kansas, from 1974 to 1994. After a journalist's article reignites the case, Rader is arrested and sentenced to ten life terms without parole.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials

programme.desc: On June 28, 2005, Joan Porco attends the trial of her son Christopher, accused of murdering his father and attacking her. Despite her initial identification and later refusal to testify, Christopher is found guilty based on circumstantial evidence.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In 1991, Ray and Faye Copeland, the oldest death row couple in the USA, are convicted of murdering five drifters. Police find the bodies after a tip-off. Faye's death sentence is commuted to life in 1999.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Nicole
programme.desc: Guest star Joan Collins, as a seductive double agent, endangers a vital IMF project when Jim Phelps falls in love with her.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Illusion
programme.desc: Cinnamon and Rollin become cabaret performers in a plot to get a deranged man (guest Fritz Weaver) to fall in love with Cinnamon, then kill her.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Interrogator
programme.desc: In a bold experiment with a man's mind, the IMF blanks out an enemy agent's memory (guest star Henry Silva), then sets out to make him think he is someone else.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Code
programme.desc: Leonard Nimoy becomes a member of the Impossible Missions Force and, as Paris of the IMF, helps crack a vital code by hijacking a plane so the enemy can capture one of the passengers

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Numbers Game
programme.desc: Guest star Mai (cq) Britt is a dangerous obstacle when the IMF sets out to learn the number of her husband's Swiss hank account by convincing him World War III has started on Paramount Television Is "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Allen vs. Ton
programme.desc: When Ton and Allen find themselves bidding against each other at an auction, the former partners battle it out in an epic showdown that leaves the fate of the pawnshop and their friendship in question.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Great American Cashtime
programme.desc: Rare 1950s Master Pitch baseball machine; 1980s Jaws of Life tool used by rescuers to pry open cars.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Off the Deep End
programme.desc: Ton and Allen quarrel over bidding strategy at a rare auction on Catalina Island and must race against the clock to unload a one man submersible that could be worth big money… if they can make it work.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Fake Punt Payoff
programme.desc: Ton and Allen contend with a large crowd of inexperienced auction-buyers at a huge storage container auction in Pasadena. They find a small fleet of Segway personal transporters and an enormous custom-made shotgun.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Friends in Hawaii Places
programme.desc: Allen &Ton enlist an assistant, Carolyn, and Allen's Hawaiian buddy, Junior, to help them battle local buyers. The guys find a WWII-era motor scooter and a stash of antique Polynesian tattoo tools that get used on Ton!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ton's Driller Instinct
programme.desc: Ton & Allen encounter aggressive outdoorsmen in the Alaskan wilderness. The guys discover an 8-wheeled ATV that travels on both land & water and an air percussion hammer that can drill through solid rock!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Always Money in Philadelphia
programme.desc: In Philadelphia, the guys face a shady bidder with inside information and former NFL star Vince Papale in a battle for a vintage football passing machine and a colonial musket that could be worth huge money if it's real.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ton's Hot Commodity
programme.desc: Allen is late to the auction, leaving Ton to battle a feisty female auction buyer on his own! The guys find a fully functional flamethrower and a rare hand-carved bow and arrow set from South America!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Separation Anxiety
programme.desc: With Ton missing, Allen struggles to keep the pawn shop afloat while training Elle to work an auction. After a fierce bidding war with Caroline, pieces from a century old motorcycle may not be enough to save the day. ed.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Beantown Bidders
programme.desc: 1800s blackpowder whaling harpoon; 1940s Schwinn Town & Country tandem bicycle; a vintage American flag collection that could be worth thousands.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Labor of Love
programme.desc: Harley Davidson V-twin EVO engine and revolutionary 1958 dual-suspension swingarm frame; '80s Ms. Pac-Man arcade machine; rare Air Jordan vintage shoe collection in mint condition.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: Family Phantoms
programme.desc: Meet the ghosts of a mother and aunt who make life difficult for the living.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: A Sense of Evil
programme.desc: Hear from terrified people who wish their sixth sense wasn’t quite so good.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: When Ghosts Get Physical
programme.desc: Witness a poltergeist become aggressive while a ghost makes a deadly return.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: Renos from Hell
programme.desc: Discover why a mansion was so cheap, and meet a spooky entity in a basement.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: Evil Intentions
programme.desc: Visit a haunted tattoo shop and witness a supernatural family reunion.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Wheatsheaf Horror
programme.desc: New owners of the Wheatsheaf Pub find bits of clothing and bones behind the walls.

programme.title: A Haunting: Vision Of Terror
programme.desc: When Stacy Stowe hears ghostly sounds in her home, she assumes it's the spirit of her late husband who died in a tragic car accident. But a psychic warns Stacy that she will find no peace until she closes the portal that has opened the door for evil.

programme.title: A Haunting: Field Of Ghosts
programme.desc: For as long as she can remember, Markie Beason has sensed something horrible happened in her home and becomes frightened to be alone in the house. Her father David, reaches out to a paranormal investigation group in hopes they can bring peace to the home.

programme.title: A Haunting: Curse Of The Mummy
programme.desc: On a visit to an exhibit of ancient Egyptian artifacts, Caleb Weaver experiences a chilling encounter with an unwrapped mummy and unleashes the wrath of a vile beast. Now stronger and more furious than ever, it seeks to possess Caleb.

programme.title: A Haunting: Sallie’s House
programme.desc: Deb and Tony’s son is born and his toys take on a life of their own.

programme.title: A Haunting: Ghost Inferno
programme.desc: Kim and Craig move into their dream home in rural Bagley, Iowa with Kim’s two young daughters. When an unseen entity attacks the family, Kim and Craig realize they could be dealing with a ghost. They turn to a demonologist to help them reclaim the house.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 19
programme.desc: While Firelord Ozai begins his master plan, the gang tries to stop him. Meanwhile, Aang seeks advice from his past lives.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 20
programme.desc: Suki, Toph, and Sokka try to stop the Fire Lord's fleet before they hit land, while Azula prepares for her coronation day.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 21
programme.desc: Sokka and Toph manage to disable the airships while Zuko and Katara confront Azula. Aang finally faces off against the Fire Lord.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 1
programme.desc: Katara and Sokka, a brother and sister from the Southern Water Tribe, discover a twelve-year-old boy frozen in an iceberg. Katara wonders if this boy is the Avatar whom the world has been awaiting.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 2
programme.desc: Prince Zuko, a young Firebender whose mission in life is to capture the Avatar, tracks Aang down to the Southern Water Tribe village where Katara and Sokka live.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 3
programme.desc: Aang is eager to take Sokka and Katara to the Air Temple where he was raised. But upon arrival, it becomes apparent that the temple is not at all how Aang remembers it.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 4
programme.desc: When locals of a small island discover Aang is the Avatar, they treat him like a celebrity.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 5
programme.desc: Aang takes Katara and Sokka to an Earthbender city. The kids cause damage and are brought before a crazy old king, who seems to enjoy messing with the kids' heads.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 6
programme.desc: The kids come to an Earth Nation town which is occupied by the Fire Nation. But will Katara's attempts to inspire the oppressed people help them or hurt them?

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 7
programme.desc: Aang, Katara, and Sokka arrive at a town being terrorized by a mysterious force from the spirit world. Aang doesn't know how to help these people, and realizes he has much to learn about being Avatar.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Sailing Stones, Brown Mountain Lights, Super Human Runner
programme.desc: ...With William Shatner. Sailing Stones, Brown Mountain Lights, Super Human Runner: A look at Death Valley boulders, mysterious dancing lights and super-marathon runners.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Time Traveller, American Stonehenge, Plant Perception
programme.desc: ...With William Shatner. Time Traveller, American Stonehenge, Plant Perception: Check out mind-reading plants, pagan human sacrifice and Californian time travellers.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Lightning Strikes, Human Hibernation, Chinese Anchors
programme.desc: ...With William Shatner. Lightning Strikes, Human Hibernation, Chinese Anchors: A man survives six lightning strikes, while a toddler is frozen solid and thawed unharmed.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Bullet Proof Boobs, Amazing Coincidences, Directional Cows
programme.desc: ...With William Shatner. Bullet Proof Boobs, Amazing Coincidences, Directional Cows: Cows align with the Earth's magnetic field, and a young makes an incredible connection.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Cellular Memory, Ice Circles, Chimera
programme.desc: ...With William Shatner. Cellular Memory, Ice Circles, Chimera: Check out a heart patient's unbelievable transformation, circles of ice in rivers and a shocking DNA test.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: The Hobbit, Limb Generation, Mind Over Matter
programme.desc: ...With William Shatner. The Hobbit, Limb Generation, Mind Over Matter: A look at the future of mind control, an extinct hobbit race and whether humans can regenerate limbs.

programme.title: Cash In The Attic: Quilter

programme.title: Cash In The Attic: Shackleton

programme.title: Cash In The Attic: Bessey

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: Among the guests on Graham's sofa are Dame Judi Dench and Sir Kenneth Branagh, world heavyweight boxing champion Anthony Joshua, Swedish star Noomi Rapace and actor and comedian Greg Davies. Also featuring music from Claire Richards.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?
programme.desc: Let's Make a Date, Secret, Quiz Show, Press Conference, Props, Multiple Personalities, Weird Newscasters.

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?
programme.desc: Wayne totally breaks the Hoedown, while Brad hosts an identity-absorbing evil genius and his hideous dates in Party Quirks. Also played are Hollywood Director and Scenes from a Hat. (S11, E07)

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?
programme.desc: Padma Lakshmi returns to play Dubbing, while Heather has to choose a date between a delinquent joyriding girl, the new Bosley and a playboy octopus and Wayne sings songs of roommates. (S11, E02)

programme.desc: Superheroes, Fixed Expressions, Old Job, New Job, Narrate, World's Worst, Props, Party Quirks.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Guys Cliffe House Pt1
programme.desc: The formidable visage of Guys Cliff House, a once great home, is awe inspiring, as are the stories pf paranormal activity within. Now home to the Masonic fraternity it is home to two temples and many lodges and chapters.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Guys Cliffe House Pt2
programme.desc: The lower Temple in this once great, but now ruined castle, is steeped in history and tales pf ghostly happenings. Stuart investigates a room that is said to house multiple spirits and feels something is watching him in the dark.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Dorchester Prison Pt1
programme.desc: With paranormal activity of every kind, Dorchester Prison isn’t for the faint hearted. Karl takes on the prison block where aggressive phantoms and poltergeists are said to roam.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Dorchester Prison Pt2
programme.desc: With Karl in the main prison block, Stuart checks out the isolation unit, with dramatic results.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Dorchester Shire Hall P1
programme.desc: Karl investigates the courtroom of one of Dorchester’s most historical buildings and is suddenly surrounded by unexplained occurrences.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Dorchester Shire Hall P2
programme.desc: Under the main building of Dorchester Shire Hall there is a warren of tunnels and cells. Stuart enters this area that is said to house many a phantom.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: York Castle Museum
programme.desc: The history of York Castle Museum is almost endless as are the paranormal stories attached to it. Karl enters the street and cells with dramatic effect.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Chaz Higgs
programme.desc: High-profile politician Kathy Augustine married nurse Chaz Higgs after a whirlwind romance. They were an unlikely match, and when their marriage hit the rocks, Chaz decided to use his medical training to commit an undetectable crime.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Denise Williams
programme.desc: Denise Williams was devastated when her husband Mike disappeared on a hunting trip. He was feared drowned. But Mike’s mother Cheryl didn’t buy it, and after years of relentless campaigning, she finally uncovered the truth about her son’s death.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Paul Novak
programme.desc: Paul Novak was a thrill-seeking paramedic who loved the hustle and bustle of the city. His wife Catherine was a homemaker and volunteer who preferred small town life. Unable to reconcile their differences, Paul decided to plan the perfect crime.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Janbaz Tarin
programme.desc: Raneem Oudeh came to the UK from Syria to escape war, looking forward to a brighter future for herself and her son. Everything was falling into place until she met Janbaz Tarin, a man who saw no boundary between love, obsession, and extreme violence.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: George Worgan
programme.desc: Kelly and George Worgan looked like the perfect parents, playing happy families on Facebook with pictures of days out. But behind closed doors, they had financial struggles and rows. When their marriage ended in murder, no one saw it coming.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Tia Young
programme.desc: George Young worked his fingers to the bone to give his loved ones a better future: his wife, Tia, their three sons, even his friend Tim Lee. How was this generosity repaid? With deception, infidelity, and a plot to cash in on his death.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Married To Madness
programme.desc: When Susan Zarriello's ex-husband David unleashes a sadistic torrent of cyber attacks 15 years after their divorce, Susan realizes he's been watching her for years.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Deadly Envy
programme.desc: An aspiring Hollywood actress is reacquainted with an old friend and fellow actress who becomes deeply jealous of her beauty and success.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: The Bogeyman
programme.desc: Sherry Meinberg is living the innocent life of a teen in the 1950s when she meets handsome Chuck Gray. But the man of her dreams soon turns into a monster.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Playing With Fire
programme.desc: Vernetta is stalked by her abusive ex-husband, Richard, after she kicks him out of the house. When Richard threatens murder, Vernetta must face the fight of her life.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Without A Trace
programme.desc: When Pam Dunn finally breaks free from her abusive relationship with Dave, things go from bad to worse as Dave relentlessly stalks and threatens her.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Fear F.M.
programme.desc: K.T. Mills is a popular radio DJ with a friendly voice. But when one deranged listener becomes obsessed with the woman behind the mic, her life is turned upside down.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Evil Intent
programme.desc: Andrew Bagby, a Canadian medical student, starts dating fellow student Shirley. But, after Andrew accepts a job in the United States, Shirley isn't ready to let him go.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Date with the Devil
programme.desc: When Ron Ruse breaks up with his controlling girlfriend, Linda, she vows to get him back at any cost. Soon, demands turn to death threats and Ron goes on the run.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: In the Spotlight
programme.desc: A well-respected TV news journalist in San Diego is stalked by a deranged fan who threatens rape and murder if she doesn't follow explicit instructions while on air.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Hopelessly Devoted
programme.desc: When Kaia Anderson is kind to fellow student Robert, she never imagined it will lead to a lifelong obsession that won't be stopped by reason or the law.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Family Vacation: Baby Mama Drama
programme.desc: Vinny puts his relationship in jeopardy when he tries to pick up a stripper, and the whole house in on edge with the arrival of Ron's baby mama, Jen.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Family Vacation: The Temptation of the Keto Guido
programme.desc: Snooki gets caught stealing from a stripper, Vinny is feeling tempted and might sin, and Pauly D is looking for love.

programme.title: Ex on the Beach: The Gloves Are Off
programme.desc: Jess finds out about Rogan's kiss with Megan and takes revenge by kissing Morgan. Meanwhile Adam has now moved on to Charlotte, and her and Kayleigh fall out, big time.

programme.title: Ex on the Beach: Girl Code
programme.desc: Out of the sea comes a familiar face - Ash from Ex On The Beach series one. The girls fancy him, the boys fear him and when Ash picks Anita for a private party, Gary goes crazy!

programme.title: Ex on the Beach: Anita's Almighty Meltdown
programme.desc: It's almost over and as some exes make peace, others will never see eye to eye. Anita has a meltdown and with one last trip to the beach, who's in for the ultimate shock?

programme.title: Ex on the Beach
programme.desc: Hold onto your bikinis, Ex On The Beach is back, and with more exes than ever! Zahida and Maisie clash over Sean, but when the first Ex blasts onto the beach the fighting really kicks in. (S6, ep1)

programme.title: Police Interceptors: Episode 4
programme.desc: Paul Jackson has his work cut out stopping a runaway driver.

programme.title: Police Interceptors: Episode 9
programme.desc: A nasty street fight leads to a taser being drawn.

programme.title: Police Interceptors: Episode 5
programme.desc: Kev reveals how to spot a drunk driver.

programme.title: Police Interceptors: Episode 6
programme.desc: Jim intercepts a car containing cannabis.

programme.title: Police Interceptors: Episode 3
programme.desc: The Lincolnshire law enforcers intercept an illegal car operation.

programme.title: Police Interceptors: Episode 3
programme.desc: Kev and Ian hunt a man roaming the streets with a machete.

programme.title: Naked Science: Magnetic Earth
programme.desc: The Earth hurtles through space protected by an invisible force field, known as a magnetosphere.

programme.title: Naked Science: How To Destroy A Planet
programme.desc: The Earth is built to last. It is a 4,550,000,000-year-old, 5,973,600,000,000,000,000,000-tonne ball of rock and iron. It has taken more devastating asteroid hits in its lifetime than you've had hot dinners, and it still orbits happily around the sun.

programme.title: scienceNOW: What's the Next Big Thing?
programme.desc: Examine scientific breakthroughs that could contribute to a better understanding of ourselves and our place in the universe: Social Robots; Robotic Cars; Detecting Earthquakes; Smart Grid; and a profile of biologist Jay Keasling.

programme.title: Naked Science: Jupiter
programme.desc: By far the largest planet, 1300 times the size of Earth, it’s a world so enormous it could swallow every planet and moon in the solar system and still have room to spare.

programme.title: Wonders: Can We Make Life?
programme.desc: New tools allow researchers to use cells to create and edit their own DNA with more ease and less cost than ever before. NOVA Wonders explores the benefits and the burden of risk surrounding this controversial new technology.

programme.title: The Truth is in the Stars EU
programme.desc: Does our society have the capacity to live up to Star Trek's optimistic vision for humanity's future? William Shatner takes us on a journey to find out whether art has imitated life in the years since the world-renowned TV series premiered in 1966.

programme.title: EARTH´S EVIL TWIN
programme.desc: Venus is a planet closest to Earth in distance and size, it once may have been as hospitable to life as Earth is now. Then something changed and Venus became shrouded in hot dense toxic clouds.

programme.title: STAR LIGHT, STAR BRIGHT
programme.desc: The two current science missions to our star; the sun have made great leaps forward in the science of how stars work, how they generate solar winds and how they affect their orbiting planets

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Science and the Shuttle
programme.desc: For more than 25 years the shuttle was our ticket to space, and our laboratory in orbit. Uncover the legacy of this amazing machine, and see what lies ahead.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Juno, Cassini and Beyond
programme.desc: The Cassini space craft has completed its mission over Saturn, Juno has reached its target and has commenced its scientific observations of the giant planet Jupiter.

programme.title: The Fabric of the Cosmos: The Illusion of Time
programme.desc: Brian Greene takes us on the ultimate time traveling adventure, hurtling 50 years into the future before stepping into a wormhole to travel back to Big Bang.

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: Project Mercury Advances - America's first manned space program finally puts a man in orbit. Camera Tracking - The array of special cameras that follow a spacecraft at launch. The International Space Station - The building and operation.

programme.title: Inside Outer Space: Episode 3: Asteroids
programme.desc: Come with us as we explore and unravel the mysteries of what lies beyond our planet Earth. This is a series packed with space stories and information about our universe covering what we can see.

programme.title: Wildest Islands
programme.desc: Islands can be home to the most extreme examples of life, the wildest of people and the most dramatic landscapes. Natural selection fuels evolution in the most dramatic way

programme.title: Wild Iran: To the North
programme.desc: Benny Rebel approaches a big cat in the semi desert with caution. An Asiatic cheetah is like an icon of Iranian nature. The carnivore accepts Benny in its closer environment.

programme.title: Human Prey: Killer Sharks
programme.desc: While diving for shellfish off Cape Howe, an Australian man ends up inside the jaws of a Great White shark. Determined to maintain his championship spear fishing title, an Australian man inadvertently becomes bait for a 15-foot-long Great White shark.

programme.title: Meerkat Manor: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Rocket Dog's pups are left vulnerable when sitters Sophie and Axel are distracted by Wilson's roving antics.

programme.title: Wild Italy: Top Predators: Two Eagles
programme.desc: Two eagles struggle to survive and produce offspring to maintain their species.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Double Trouble
programme.desc: Dog's feeling lucky, so he's going to try to capture two women in one day. The first, Moani, has "crazy" tattooed on her neck and is facing drug charges. The second fugitive, Jade, who turns out to be a tough catch, despite help from Jade's sister.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Big Island, Small Town
programme.desc: Dog has problems when he goes to a small town on the Big Island of Hawaii to track down a fugitive. In a small town, everyone knows everyone else's business, making it impossible for Dog to hunt in secret.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Jonah is Missing
programme.desc: Dog and the team search for Jonah, a violent and desperate criminal facing?20 years in jail. The trail goes stale when Dog runs into evasive family members and an angry girlfriend.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Suga On My Cuffs
programme.desc: Dog and the team go after Kandice, AKA Candy, AKA Suga, a stripper who didn't make her court appearance. They convince one of her friends to lure her to a supermarket parking lot, where Dog has an easy time fetching the fetching young thing. But then

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Mothers and Daughters
programme.desc: Dog and Beth take on the heartbreaking case of Rachel. Rachel's mom bailed her out of jail on condition that she go to AA meetings and stick to a curfew. But Rachel hasn't kept up her end of the bargain, and now her mother wants her back to jail.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Dog Is Smokin'
programme.desc: Dog is trying to cut down on smoking, but it's not easy with his high-stress job. Today, he must track down Walter, a fugitive who believes that the Canadian military has planted a chip in his tooth that allows him to communicate with his van.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: You Snooze, You Lose
programme.desc: Beth designs a luxurious new office for the team and shows it off to Dog, but the bounty hunter is more interested in starting his hunt for Federico, who's been revoked for missing court dates and generally running amuck.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Judgment Day
programme.desc: Dog goes on his a case, which involves Bobby, who's been on parole for three months pending sentencing on an assault charge. Bobby's girlfriend wants him back in jail, and Dog agrees that the Bobby needs to be behind bars.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Moms & Dads
programme.desc: Dog pursues two people whose lives have been ruined by drugs. First, he tracks Mae, who traded a good home and loving family for an ice pipe. The next case involves Jude. His addiction has caused his pregnant wife to fear for her safety.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Do Unto Others
programme.desc: Dog is a rough, tough bounty hunter, but he's a softie at heart, as the two cases in this episode show.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: The Campfire Diaries
programme.desc: The family spends a weekend at their childhood summer camp, reliving old memories and working to repair a tennis court Willie built twenty years ago. While at the camp, Jep tries to pass a lifeguard swimming test he failed as a teenager.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Rowdy's Big Day
programme.desc: Rowdy's adoption is finalized and he officially becomes a Robertson. Jase gets his first massage and enjoys it more than he expected.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Disappearing Acts

programme.desc: Willie, Korie, Jase and Missy take dance lessons from Sadie to prepare for Reed and Rebecca's upcoming weddings. Jase's plan to perform Reed's wedding ceremony may fall through when he waits until the last minute to renew his ordainment.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: End of an Era

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Looking Back and Talking Quack
programme.desc: The Robertson family takes a look back at 130 episodes of Duck Dynasty.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: The Grass & The Furious

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Driving Miss Sadie

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Secret Government Warehouses
programme.desc: From Fort Knox to Hangar 18 and Camp Hero, discover a series of top-secret and high-security national database centres.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Rise Of The Machines
programme.desc: If technology goes too far, too fast, a time may come when humans are no longer at the top of the evolutionary food chain.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Bigfoot
programme.desc: The evidence for Bigfoot piles up, causing some to wonder who has been keeping information from the public.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Anti-Christ?

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Top Ten Secret Societies

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Fake World Leaders
programme.desc: Fake World Leaders: Are Hitler, Saddam Hussein and Osama Bin Laden really dead? Experts find proof that several infamous world leaders didn't die when you think they did.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Nazis Today
programme.desc: For decades, there have been rumours key members of Hitler’s inner circle escaped the fall of Berlin - maybe even the Führer himself. But where did they go and what is their plan?

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Mind Control
programme.desc: There are those who wish to control what others think, how they act and what they believe. Discover the new practices in mind-control.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Haarp
programme.desc: Governments around the world may be using weather control to incite the next World War and possibly destroy the planet.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: America's Alien Wars
programme.desc: Has our government been at war with alien aggressors for the past half century? Startling evidence indicates that the US military has been under attack and has kept it from the public.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Global Depopulation
programme.desc: Disasters, famine and pandemics threaten civilisation on a global scale. A cataclysmic event may spell the end of civilisation and the human race could face extinction.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Remote Viewing
programme.desc: Documents may prove that the government has a secret group of remote viewers watching its citizens: the CIA's 'psy ops army'.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur Goes To Camp/Buster Makes The Grade
programme.desc: Arthur and his friends go to summer camp where it's strictly boys vs. girls. Next, Buster Baxter is everyone's favorite jokester. Unfortunately, though, Buster's grades aren't as good as his jokes, and Buster may have to repeat third grade.

programme.title: Arthur: The Great MacGrady, Parts 1 & 2

programme.title: Embedded 45' - Shooting War in Germany: Embedded 45 - Shooting War in Germany 1
programme.desc: This first episode covers the last week of February to late March. When American troops started their final invasion of Nazi Germany in February 1945, U.S. Army cameramen were at their side.

programme.title: Embedded 45' - Shooting War in Germany: Embedded 45 - Shooting War in Germany 2
programme.desc: This second episode covers the last week of March to late April. The cameramen covered many stories of victory and defeat, death and liberation. Faces of despair and joy, scenes of war and peace.

programme.title: Gestapo: Hitler's Secret Police
programme.desc: Hermann Goering’s Secret State Police were tasked to arrest and torture confessions and information from supposed enemies of the Reich.

programme.title: Hitler's Propaganda Machine: Building The Brand
programme.desc: Hitler’s fascination with propaganda was born in the trenches of the First World War. There he saw it emerge as a potent tool of psychological warfare - one that he would harness to build the Nazi movement. Witness Hitler's early propaganda tactics.

programme.title: Hitler's Propaganda Machine: Power and Persuasion
programme.desc: This episode explores Hitler's approach to propaganda in power; where persuasion was achieved through propaganda and terror, all in service of one goal: the creation of a state under one shared ideology. A new German power fueled by propaganda.

programme.title: The Abyss: Rise And Fall of The Nazis: The Seeds of Violence 1918-1922

programme.title: Secret Nazi Expeditions: The Quest for the Holy Grail

programme.desc: The criminal exploits of Public Enemy number 1, George 'Machine-Gun' Kelly, during the 1930s.

programme.title: The Debt Collector
programme.desc: French is a martial artist that takes on a job as a mob debt collector in order to make ends meet. He does whatever it takes to chase down individuals until he meets a bartender that makes him question whether he should do the right thing.

programme.title: The Reunion
programme.desc: After the death of her father, a daughter fulfills his last wish and finds a way to bring her three brothers back together... Sam, a hardened cop. Leo, a loud-mouthed overbearing bail bondsman. And Douglas, a twenty-year old thief fresh out of prison.

programme.title: Arctic
programme.desc: Mads Mikkelsen stars as a pilot whose plane has crashed in a remote corner of the Arctic. Stranded in the wilderness he uses his ingenuity to survive. But he is forced to make a perilous choice between the safety of his camp and a trek into the unknown.

programme.title: Hackers
programme.desc: A neophyte hacker becomes the target of the FBI after he unknowingly taps into a high-tech embezzling scheme which could cause a horrific environmental disaster in this suspenseful drama.

programme.title: Terminal

programme.desc: After uncovering evidence that her stepfather was murdered by a ring of corrupt cops and judges, including her DA ex-husband, a woman is forced to flee with her daughter and hide in a small farming town.

programme.title: Sorority Sister Killer

programme.title: Space Truckers

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: The Lord of the Rings
programme.desc: J.R.R Tolkien’s children’s book and trilogy take the world by storm, appealing to the fans its author would least expect. After several failed attempts to adapt the books and one half-successful animated movie, an unlikely hero takes on the film.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: The Lord of the Rings
programme.desc: With the clock ticking Peter Jackson has to find a studio to save his work in progress. Only one studio is willing to take the gamble on three films made at once adapting an unwanted property led by an unproven director on the other side of the world.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: The Lord of the Rings
programme.desc: After a successful teaser at Cannes, the team races to complete the first film on time. Meanwhile filming begins to take a toll on the cast and crew. As injuries pile up, the most demanding scene in the trilogy nearly breaks them.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: The Lord of the Rings

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: The Lord of the Rings
programme.desc: The studio that backed the films takes a gamble too far. Peter Jackson struggles in vain to avoid the burden of directing. In the midst of a grueling shoot one of the dwarves is sent packing.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: The Lord of the Rings
programme.desc: Peter Jackson pushes the bounds both on the page and on screen. But will audiences like what they see? A legendary chapter comes to a close leaving its mark on the film industry.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: A misunderstanding leads everyone to believe Cyril is marrying Lady Baden-Baden. Cedric questions his past while Mr. Knox hides his feelings for her. As confusion grows, truths come out and relationships are tested.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: The pigs invent a time machine, which Cyril uses to alter past events for personal gain. However, his meddling causes chaos in the present, forcing the gang to fix the timeline before things spiral completely out of control.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In a gruesome 1989 case, Tracey Wigginton and her accomplices lure Edward Baldock with promises of a good time, only to brutally stab him to death, sparking a sensational trial that raised questions about the roles of her accomplices.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In 1983, Graeme Cunningham vanishes in Salt Lake City. Detective Don Bell discovers Arthur Bishop, who confesses to killing Graeme and four other boys. Bishop is found guilty in 1984 and executed in 1988.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In September 1987, Simon Dale is murdered. His ex-wife, Susan Wilberforce, is acquitted of the crime but later convicted of fraud and sentenced to seven years. The murder remains unsolved.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In 1990, Danny Rolling killed five students in Gainesville, Florida. He confessed to the crimes, pleaded guilty to avoid the death penalty, but was ultimately sentenced to death and executed 16 years later.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In 2006, Nina Sharanova vanished in Oakland. Her ex-husband, Hans Reiser, was convicted of her murder after their son’s testimony and leading police to her body. Reiser is now appealing the conviction.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Gloucester Prison P1
programme.desc: HMP Gloucester is a houses a huge selection of buildings, Karl investigates one block where spirits are said to make themselves known on a regular basis.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Gloucester Prison P2

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Tia Young
programme.desc: George Young worked his fingers to the bone to give his loved ones a better future: his wife, Tia, their three sons, even his friend Tim Lee. How was this generosity repaid? With deception, infidelity, and a plot to cash in on his death.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Chacey Poynter
programme.desc: Bob Poynter was old enough to be Chacey’s father. And he was married. But those were minor obstacles to her. However, when their romance hit the skids, Chacey enlisted yet another of her lovers to help bring the marriage to a brutal end.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: David Clark
programme.desc: Melanie and David Clark’s marriage was the definition of toxic. He was controlling and angry, and she had affairs. They seemed unable to tear themselves apart - until one violent incident ended their marriage for good.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Nat Fraser
programme.desc: Arlene McInnes and Nat Fraser had a whirlwind romance, marrying and having their first child within 18 months of meeting. But Nat soon revealed himself as a womanising, violent bully. When she rebelled against him, he hatched a plot to punish her.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Brian Burns
programme.desc: Brian and Carla Burns were both medics in their 40s when they met and fell in love. But married bliss didn’t last, and divorce proceedings were messy. Carla disappeared, and fingers pointed at Brian, but he was ready with a bizarre explanation.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Hopelessly Devoted
programme.desc: When Kaia Anderson is kind to fellow student Robert, she never imagined it will lead to a lifelong obsession that won't be stopped by reason or the law.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Hell Hath No Fury
programme.desc: When George Long's girlfriend demands they get married, he breaks off the relationship. But nothing can stop Cheryl's relentless obsession. If she can't marry him, nobody can.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Teenage Obsession
programme.desc: When outgoing Cameron Wallace meets shy Ryan Clutter in a high school art class, they are only acquaintances. Little does she know that Ryan will stalk her for the next ten years.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Love is a Battlefield
programme.desc: A young nurse falls in love and marries the man of her dreams. But before long, her husband becomes violent and controlling.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Wolf In Sheep's Clothing
programme.desc: Judy Phillips is recovering from kidney disease when she meets a handsome young man. But, soon, he reveals a taste for cruelty.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Collateral Damage
programme.desc: Rachel Wilson's marriage falls apart when husband Darrell starts hiring hookers. But when Rachel moves on and finds the perfect man, Darrell erupts in rage.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Off the Deep End
programme.desc: Sheila Taormina, an Olympic gold medalist, finds herself receiving strange phone calls and letters from a fellow athlete. Before long, he is following her around the country.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Sex & Malice
programme.desc: After Ann Moulds is bombarded with sadistic letters from an anonymous stalker, she tries to get help from police. But with no stalking laws in Scotland, she's at her stalker's mercy.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Dangerous Games
programme.desc: At first, Karen Welch thinks nothing of the mysterious call she receives on Christmas Eve.

programme.title: Ex on the Beach

programme.title: Ex on the Beach: Harriette's Love Triangle
programme.desc: The misery continues for the singles as Sean moves from Zahida to Zaralena, and Harriette's love triangle deepens. Maisie's desperate for action and a Geordie makes a spectacular entrance.

programme.title: Laguna Beach: Fast Cars & Fast Women
programme.desc: When LC, Stephen and Trey check out a designer fashion show in LA, LC watches Stephen's attention turn from fashion to fashion models.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 12

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 13

programme.title: Police Interceptors: Episode 3
programme.desc: Kev and Ian hunt a man roaming the streets with a machete.

programme.title: Police Interceptors: Episode 10
programme.desc: A criminal gang are busted in their hotel beds.

programme.title: Police Interceptors: Episode 9
programme.desc: Jim and the team spring a trap on suspected drug dealers.

programme.title: Police Interceptors: Episode 8
programme.desc: Kev and Steve go on the hunt for heroin dealers.

programme.title: Police Interceptors: Episode 8
programme.desc: One man claims that he has been driving with a dodgy numberplate for the past 18 years.

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: A suspected drug-driver is stopped.

programme.title: Wonders: Can We Make Life?
programme.desc: New tools allow researchers to use cells to create and edit their own DNA with more ease and less cost than ever before. NOVA Wonders explores the benefits and the burden of risk surrounding this controversial new technology.

programme.title: scienceNOW: How Smart Can We Get?
programme.desc: How Smart Can We Get? How do you get a genius brain? Is it all in the genes? Or is it hard work? Episodes include: Einstein's Brain; Mystery of the Savant Brain; What is Intelligence?; and Profile: Sian Beilock.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: VOLCANOES
programme.desc: Volcanoes are Earth’s geologic architects. They’ve created more than 80 percent of our planet’s surface and their explosive force has crafted both mountains and craters.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: HURRICANES
programme.desc: Hurricanes, Typhoons and Cyclones all the same thing with different names – what they also have in common is their destructive power! Hurricanes are large, swirling storms and winds from a hurricane can damage buildings or trees.

programme.title: Naked Science: Saturn
programme.desc: Saturn is the second-largest planet in the solar system. Storms on this gas giant can cover an area bigger than the United States Clouds of the gas race around the planet at over 1000 miles per hour generating fierce electrical storms and lightning.

programme.title: Wonders: What are Animals Saying?
programme.desc: NOVA Wonders travels around the globe, where researchers are deciphering an amazing array of clues that reveal how animals share information critical to their survival.

programme.title: Inside Outer Space: Episode 3: Asteroids
programme.desc: Come with us as we explore and unravel the mysteries of what lies beyond our planet Earth. This is a series packed with space stories and information about our universe covering what we can see.

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: Project Mercury Begins - The start of NASA & America's first manned space program. Mars Express - The European Space Agency's Mars Satellite. The Soyuz Launch System - The gradual evolution of Russia's Soyuz launcher.

programme.title: Inside Outer Space: Episode 6: Fermi paradox
programme.desc: Come with us as we explore and unravel the mysteries of what lies beyond our planet Earth. This is a series packed with space stories and information about our universe covering what we can see.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Where Are All the Aliens?
programme.desc: We’re looking hard, but the numbers aren’t stacking up, is life on other planets that hard to find? Even signals from an advanced race elude us.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Heavy Lift
programme.desc: New heavy lift rockets are taking to the sky. Falcon Heavy, SLS, Arianne 6 and Vega C rockets are primed to begin the next phase of space expansion.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Milky Way
programme.desc: This episode traces our view of the Milky Way, from the mythology of ancient sky watchers to the efforts of scientists to map it from the inside out.

programme.title: Inside Outer Space: Episode 8: Extravehicular Activity
programme.desc: Come with us as we explore and unravel the mysteries of what lies beyond our planet Earth. This is a series packed with space stories and information about our universe covering what we can see.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas
programme.desc: See the sun, moon, planets, and galaxies through the eyes of intrepid machines that are blazing a trail across the solar system. A gateway to bold adventures, these cameras are delivering spectacular new cosmic vistas.

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: The Beginning of the End - After the first Moon landing the Apollo science program was about to start in earnest but people were losing interest. Apollo Gets Complicated - New technology is added that extends the reach of the Apollo program.

programme.title: In the Shadow of the Moon
programme.desc: Between 1968 and 1972, the world watched in awe each time an American spacecraft voyaged to the Moon. Only 12 men walked upon its surface and they remain the only human beings to have stood on another world.

programme.title: Wild Italy: Top Predators: Two Eagles
programme.desc: Two eagles struggle to survive and produce offspring to maintain their species.

programme.title: Wild Baltic Sea: Between Estonia and Finland
programme.desc: A world of thousands of islands between Estonia, Sweden and Finland.

programme.title: Wild Assassins: Pack Tectics
programme.desc: Welcome to the world of wild assassins, where packs, troops and prides of predators roam, finding safety and strength in numbers.

programme.title: Wildest Indochina: Thailand – The Wild Heart
programme.desc: Thailand is a land of extremes. A country shaped by wild forces, where animals face tough challenges to survive. Yet they have evolved into some of the most iconic and successful species on the planet.

programme.title: Wildest Middle East
programme.desc: Wildest Middle East reveals the remotest and most surprising corners of this ancient land, where you will find nothing is as it seems and where the natural world is fighting a constant battle to survive in an ever changing world.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Do Unto Others
programme.desc: Dog is a rough, tough bounty hunter, but he's a softie at heart, as the two cases in this episode show.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: A Helping Hand
programme.desc: Dog answers two very different calls for help from women. In the first case, he helps Leland protect Maria, who's being threatened by her violent husband. Then Dog visit a young woman who's dying and has asked to see Dog as one of her final wishes.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Take Your Daughter to Work Day
programme.desc: Baby Lyssa, who's just turned 18 and is studying to become a bondsman, gets to do some on-the-job training when she helps Dog hunt for Wayne, who's run out on a bond for second-degree assault.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: In Sickness and In Health
programme.desc: Dog is sick as a dog, but he still must lead the hunt for a fugitive named James. James' girlfriend tries to cover for him, but Dog surprises James in his bedroom and leads him away in cuffs.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: If the Shirt Fits...
programme.desc: Beth buys Dog a shirt with an embroidered chicken, but Dog explains he only wears shirts with pictures of either Jesus or a Harley-Davidson. When it's time to go to work, the team goes after Necia, a fugitive with felony charges pending.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: The Thief Who Stole Christmas
programme.desc: It's Christmas day, and Dog sets out to nab Raymond, who robs to support his ice habit, and give him a little Christmas gift - shiny new handcuffs.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Rock-a-Bye Bounty
programme.desc: Dog and Beth must go after their former housekeeper, Lisa, who's jumped bond. They know this case will be tricky because Lisa knows everyone in the family. Luckily, Beth's nephew, Jason, is visiting and is quickly put to work as the bait.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Father-Hood
programme.desc: Before Tim heads out for a tough day of bounty hunting, he likes to get in a little quality time with his daughter, Summer Rain.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Cops and Criminals
programme.desc: After giving a rousing speech to an audience of enthusiastic grade-schoolers, Dog catches up with an old friend, Sheriff Tommy Cayetano, to talk business. Dog's got a tough fugitive, named Mia, to catch and Tommy is happy to lend a hand.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Cupid in Cuffs
programme.desc: It's the day before Valentine's Day and love is in the air at Da Kine Bail Bonds--but not for Tapi who has failed to appear in court on theft charges. Dog's plan is to have Leland knock on Tapi's door with a Valentine's gift to draw her out.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Bonds of Love
programme.desc: Dog and Beth are finally getting married! They've been together for more than ten years but Dog is determined, as he puts it, to "marry his common law wife the Christian way."

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Driving Miss Sadie
programme.desc: With Sadie's driver's license test fast approaching, she finds herself in dire need of lessons. Willie, Jase and Si each set out to correct her glaring failures behind the wheel by teaching her how to drive... Robertson-style.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Truck Commander
programme.desc: After Willie's son, John Luke, leaves Willie's pickup in the driveway with a bone-dry gas tank, Willie and Korie decide that it's time to get the kid his own car.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Si-Yonara
programme.desc: The Duck Commander assembly room gets an unexpected shakeup when a disgruntled Si decides to quit his job.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Fowl Play
programme.desc: Willie finds his office in shambles and alerts the authorities that the warehouse has had a break in.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Sweatin' Bullets
programme.desc: When a heat wave envelops West Monroe the air conditioning unit at the Duck Commander warehouse goes down, turning the duck call assembly room into a boiling sweatshop.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Spring Pong Cleaning
programme.desc: After Korie decides the junk piles in the Duck Commander warehouse are beginning to reach critical mass, she calls on Willie and the guys to do a little company spring-cleaning.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Good Morning, West Monroe
programme.desc: After attending a local radio show as a guest, Willie sees an opportunity to host a show of his own.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Of Mattresses and Men
programme.desc: The Jase, Si and the guys from the duck call room take a field trip to a brand new local donut shop and quickly find out who amongst them can eat the most delicious treats.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Samurai Si
programme.desc: Willie receives a special gift from a Japanese business associate - a "priceless" samurai sword, which Willie keeps out of the hands of Jase and the guys.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Duck No, We Won't Go
programme.desc: Willie pushes his work force too far after implementing new "motivational work tactics," and the guys rise up against him and go on strike.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Drag Me To Glory
programme.desc: When NASCAR sensation Clint Bowyer pays a visit to the Duck Commander warehouse, Willie and the guys are fired up to spend the day hanging out with the professional racecar driver.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Remote Viewing
programme.desc: Documents may prove that the government has a secret group of remote viewers watching its citizens: the CIA's 'psy ops army'.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Secret Government Warehouses
programme.desc: From Fort Knox to Hangar 18 and Camp Hero, discover a series of top-secret and high-security national database centres.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Rise Of The Machines
programme.desc: If technology goes too far, too fast, a time may come when humans are no longer at the top of the evolutionary food chain.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Bigfoot
programme.desc: The evidence for Bigfoot piles up, causing some to wonder who has been keeping information from the public.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Anti-Christ?
programme.desc: Every culture and religion on the planet believes that an evil one will usher in the end of days. But who is this Anti-Christ? And how can we hope to stop him?

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Top Ten Secret Societies
programme.desc: An elite group of power players may be plotting the fate of the planet. Discover the secrets behind ten powerful hidden organisations around the world.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Fake World Leaders
programme.desc: Fake World Leaders: Are Hitler, Saddam Hussein and Osama Bin Laden really dead? Experts find proof that several infamous world leaders didn't die when you think they did.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Nazis Today
programme.desc: For decades, there have been rumours key members of Hitler’s inner circle escaped the fall of Berlin - maybe even the Führer himself. But where did they go and what is their plan?

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Nearly three hundred million people worldwide claim to have been abducted by aliens. Many report being subjected to torturous medical experiments. Others return with unwelcome reminders of their ordeal. Are aliens creating human hybrids?

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: In the 1960s we too our first steps into a vast new realm—bound for the Moon. But NASA astronauts would soon find they weren’t the only ones out there.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Millions of people believe extraterrestrial live on Earth. Are the aliens here to enlighten us or destroy us? What if the worst-case scenario happened? What would aliens do? And how would they do it?

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: They’re our first line of defense in the darkest of times. And they’re often the first responders to threats from another world. Over the past 70 years the world’s military forces have come face to face with thousands of unidentified objects.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: 18-year-old Telizza became bi-curious when her online friendship with Shai turned romantic. Frustrated by several failed attempts to video chat, Telizza has turned to Nev and Max to uncover the truth.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: After months of sexting with a hot model he met on a hookup app, Marvin is eager to meet him in person. Max and sidekick, singer Chantal Claret, agree to help Marvin find his crush, but soon uncover more than they bargained for!

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Max and co-host iO Tillett Wright help 18-year-old Mecca connect with the boy she's loved for the past 5 years. But when iO discovers that Mecca's digital beau may be using her pictures to catfish others, Mecca needs answers.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Nev and Max receive emails from opposite sides of the same online romance, each concerned that the other may be a catfish! The guys are taken aback when one side decides to follow through with their marriage plans!

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Antwane & Tony
programme.desc: Nev and Max are contacted by Carmen who is sounding the alarm on behalf of her cousin, Antwane. He's been in a three-year romance with a man named Tony that he met on a telephone chat line.

programme.title: Danger Mouse

programme.title: Pink Panther & Pals: Pink Up the Volume

programme.title: THE NEW PINK PANTHER SHOW

programme.title: THE NEW PINK PANTHER SHOW

programme.title: THE NEW PINK PANTHER SHOW
programme.desc: 'The Inspector's Club': the Inspector accepts a challenge to solve the mystery of the mythical lost city of Atlantis. 'A Royal Pain': Bellhop Pinky stands in for a visiting 10-year-old king at a King's Convention and nearly starts World War III.

programme.title: Danger Mouse

programme.title: THE NEW PINK PANTHER SHOW

programme.title: THE NEW PINK PANTHER SHOW
programme.desc: 'Pinky in Toyland': Witness to a bank heist, the Panther evades robbers by masquerading as a stuffed animal. 'The Detective of Oz': Pinky works as a hard-boiled detective in the Emerald City helping a dame named Dorothy find her stolen ruby pumps.

programme.desc: In 1935, Otto Rahn, a German writer, was tasked by Heinrich Himmler to find the Holy Grail. Himmler, despite his Nazi beliefs, envisioned displaying it in his castle, Wewelsberg, as his Camelot.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Agenda 21
programme.desc: Is Agenda 21 simply a non-binding, voluntarily implemented action plan of the United Nations with regard to sustainable development?

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Depopulation Agenda
programme.desc: Richard interviews an investigative health reporter and a NY Times best-selling author about their claims that a powerful cabal is waging war on mankind through forced sterilization, vaccination and other means.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Richard meets the owners of an abnormal humanoid skull allegedly discovered in Mexico in the 1930s and a researcher who has had the skull subjected to numerous tests including carbon-14 dating, and DNA in order to determine it’s origin.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: The discovery of an ancient copper scroll in a Jordanian cave leads to a lifelong quest by a young British scholar in the search for lost Jewish Treasure.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: MYSTERIOUS WORKS OF ART
programme.desc: Great art and its creators unveil mysteries more intricate than TV dramas. Amidst theft and intrigue, we persist in solving them. Yet, the truth often lies buried with those who created it, adding layers of intrigue to the art world.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Water Engine
programme.desc: Did the late Stanley Meyer figure out a way to run an internal combustion engine on pure water? And was he murdered because of the threat his invention posed to Big Oil?

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Does the Bible contain hidden messages encoded within certain passages of the Old Testament? Is the prophetic nature of these 'codes' proof the Bible's author is of supernatural or extraterrestrial origin?
